title: DALEK MOD: Cloak Panel
description:
This mod adds the cloaking ability to the dalek mod tardis. the mod has other features coming soon.

If anybody has any ideas of other possible features or other addons for Dalek Mod relating to tardis panels feel free to message me on discord @torchwood1
body:
# DalekMod: Cloak Panel
A [Dalek Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod) addon that adds the ability to cloak your TARDIS.

## Obtaining
The panel can be obtained either by crafting it, or by getting it from the creative menu. 
### Recipe
![2 circuits, 1 redstone lamp, 3 stone](https://jacobempire.uk/dev/dalekmodaddons/images/cloak-panel-recipe.png)

## Usage
To use the panel, simply click on it inside of the TARDIS, and it will toggle the cloak.

## Updates
Future updates to come to decrease the Power of this panel, this updates will including making the panel use Artron, this is why when you move the tardis the cloak disables itself, other updates may include a sonic feature which allows you to sonic your tardis which enable the cloak without being in the tardis
